titleStmt.title: SII 20.198: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 198. (B.K. No. 26 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒS11VAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab built to the wall of the Taluk Office.

summary.p: This record is dated Śaka 11[49], Sarvajit, Kartika, s11u, Ashṭami, Monday, corresponding to A.D. 1227, October 18, Monday, on which day the tithi commenced at ·93 and continued on the next day upto ·84.

The inscription records a gift of land and house-site, after purchase from Goggiyāchārya (?), by Mūrujāvidēva, disciple of Kēdāradēva for the srīkārya of the gods Kēdāradēva and Chikkēśvaradēva at Purikara-nagara and for the feeding of the ascetics, when Malliseṭṭi was governing the Karṇāṭa-vishaya. It also records a gift, made after purchase from Tīkiseṭṭi, son of Bharatiseṭṭi, by the same Mūrujāvidēva to Jñānasōma-paṇḍita, the āchārya of the Sōmanāthadēva temple for the śrīkārya of god Kēdārēśvara.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© mattamā yādavānvayōnnatacakravartiya diśāvartti kīrttiyumappa siṁha
ṇakṣōṇipāḷana rājyamācaṁdrārkkamuttarōttaraṁ mire tatpādapadmō pajīviyuṁ saka
ḷadharmmapratipāḷasvabhāviyumappa malliseṭṭi tadājñeyiṁ karṇnā
ṭaviṣayamaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁdarasugeyyutta suracirasamasta dharmmasthira
taramahimāvaḷaṁbanaṁ dakṣiṇabaṁdhuravāraṇa baduṁ dharaṇiyalli puri
karanagaraṁ . Ā nagaradoḷesevaṁ girijānāthaṁ ra sōmanāthaṁ pīnajaṭō
dyattriśūlaḍamarusamētaṁ . mattamā raṁjitaparisūtraprākāra
diṁdoḷage nairutadiśābhāgamanaḷaṁkarisi . yamamēya pūjāvi
ṣayaṁ vasudhājananayanapriyamesevudu . Aṁtu pūrvvaprakathitama
himōdayanenisida śrīkēdāradēvadēvēśana kaprabhāvaudāryya
numenisi . kēdāradēvayatipatipādāṁbujama daśasthitabhuvanaṁ mē
diniyoḷu mūṟujāvidēvaṁ negaḷdaṁ . Atiśaya yaśō naniścalaika dhyānaṁ kṛta
budhavāṁcchitadānaṁ kṣitigesedaṁ mūṟujāvidēvamuni mū ṟujāvidēvaru śrī sōmanā
thadēvara sthaḷavṛttiya holadoḷagaṇa sūḷivāḍikeya mālagāṟagēri yoḷagaṇa
māḷige sahitamappoṁdu nivēśanamumaṁ śakavarṣada 1149 neya sarvajitsaṁvatsarada kārtika śu
ddhāṣṭami sōmavāradaṁdu goggiyācāryya nāṟu hoṁge kraya
svarūpadiṁ dhārāpūrvvakaṁ koṁḍā keyyoḷage ye bhūmiyiṁ paḍuvaṇa mattaraydu
manā śrī kēdāradēvara śrīkāryyakke Ālliha tapōdhanara bhikṣakkeveṁdu māḍidara mattamā ma
ttaraydaṟa vāyavyadiṟisilugāvina mattaru mūṟumaṁ śrī cikkēśvaradēvara śrīkāryya
kkeṁdu māḍidaru . mattaṁ Ā sthaḷadalli śrī sōmanāthadēvarācāryya jñānasōma paṁḍi
tadēvara kayyalu bharatiseṭṭiya maga tīkiseṭṭiyaru byavahāramārggadiṁ dānā
du paricchēdavāgi baṁda Ere mattaru yeraḍumaṁ Ā tīkiseṭṭiya kayyalu krayasvarū
padiṁ dhārāpūrvvakavāgi mūṟujāvidēvaru śrīkēdārēśvaradēvara śrīkāryakkeṁ
du koṁḍa Ere mattareraḍu Antu mattaru haṁnoṁdu . maṁgaḷa mahā śrī
Digital edition of SII 20.198 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
